task description ('You are a Performance Engineer...')
implied by the task description utilizing AWS infrastructure components (EC2, RDS, Load Balancer)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world server and network metrics sourced from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) dataset, confirming it is not synthetic. It accurately requires the creation of a dashboard titled 'Dependency Bottleneck Correlation' containing exactly three graphs ('Database vs Load', 'Web Speed vs Load', 'EC2 vs Load'). The verifier perfectly aligns with the task instructions, explicitly checking for the specified dashboard name, graph titles, and the correct application of normalization functions to EC2, RDS, web speed, and load balancer metrics. All metadata claims exactly match the verification logic and task setup.
